Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is off calendar per the request of the moving party

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Continued To Mar-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES.

Appearances: Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the District Attorney (415.553.4997) for petitioner and moving party; Daven Woolfolk, claimant appearing in propria persona.

The parties stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem. Discussed and the parties are directed to meet and confer on the issue. The motion is continued to March 30, 2017 at 9:00 am. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
